questions.scenario: A task currently runs `echo "ORDERS_API_PORT=8080" >> /etc/default/devpolaris-orders-api`. What is the best Ansible replacement?

options.text: `ansible.builtin.lineinfile` with a `regexp` for `^ORDERS_API_PORT=` and one desired `line`.
`ansible.builtin.shell` with the same echo command but a clearer task name.
`ansible.builtin.command` with `changed_when: true` so every run looks changed.
`ansible.builtin.debug` because debug output changes the file safely.

questions.explanation: `lineinfile` can enforce one matching line. A repeated append can duplicate the setting every time the playbook runs.
